goal: Fix infrastructure bugs that break colony seal: state-mutate panic on nested fields, chamber-create path doubling in entomb YAML, and XML export output format quirks

learnings.claim: When setting nested JSON fields via sjson, use SetRawBytes for raw JSON values (numbers, booleans, null, objects, arrays) and SetBytes only for plain strings — json.Unmarshal first to detect the type
learnings.evidence: 3 targeted tests pass: numeric values stored as numbers not quoted strings, deep nested paths work, array-indexed paths work

learnings.phase_name: Fix state-mutate panic on nested fields

learnings.claim: When building colony archive XML exports, load actual data from colony store (pheromones.json, instincts.json) and hub store (registry/colonies.json) rather than passing nil — use struct-based XML unmarshal round-trip for reliable output
learnings.evidence: 3 tests pass: output flag, positional arg, all sections present. Archive produces valid XML with pheromones, wisdom, and registry sections.

learnings.claim: Cobra sticky-flag problem: flag values persist across Execute() calls on the same Command struct. Prefer positional args over --output flag to avoid stale flag values in alias commands
learnings.evidence: TestColonyArchiveXMLPositionalArg passes with positional arg taking priority over --output flag

learnings.phase_name: Fix XML archive export format and output handling

learnings.claim: When extending conventional commit type allowlists in Cobra commands, update both the validation slice and the --flag help string to prevent drift — use a derived help string from the slice
learnings.evidence: Added seal/milestone/pause/contextual to validCommitTypes; Auditor flagged help string duplication as MEDIUM; tests confirm all 4 new types work

learnings.claim: learning-check-promotion needs --all flag to batch-check all observations for eligibility, not just single observation by ID — seal.md calls without args so both modes must work
learnings.evidence: Tests pass: --all returns eligible list, --observation-id returns single check. Both modes verified.

learnings.claim: learning-promote-auto must call PromoteService.Promote() not just count eligible — the stub only counted but never created instincts in instincts.json
learnings.evidence: 5 observations promoted to instincts.json (18 total). Verify-claims confirms file consistency.

learnings.claim: Race detector tests catch concurrency issues early — run with -race on all colony phases that involve parallel workers
learnings.evidence: go test ./cmd/... -race passes with no race conditions detected

learnings.claim: Smoke-test new CLI flags with --help before declaring feature complete — validates flag registration without complex integration tests
learnings.evidence: Verified --all flag on learning-check-promotion and --active on registry-add via --help output
